task: Driver Load Experience V2 - Cost Transparency & Permission Fix

summary.description: Driver Load Experience V2 implementation complete with cost transparency and fixed RBAC permission bug preventing drivers from accepting available loads.
key_improvements: ✅ Fixed 403 Forbidden error in acceptLoad/rejectLoad mutations
✅ Drivers can now accept available loads (status=available, assignedDriverId=null)
✅ Drivers can reject available loads with reason
✅ Cost transparency: fuel, maintenance, tolls displayed with 'Estimado' label
✅ Sidebar navigation fixed for 'Mis Cargas' tab
✅ All changes frontend-only, no database schema modifications
✅ RBAC enforcement: drivers cannot see owner routes
✅ Detailed logging added for debugging acceptance/rejection attempts

permission_fix.issue: 403 Forbidden error when drivers attempted to accept available loads
permission_fix.root_cause: Permission logic in acceptLoad/rejectLoad mutations incorrectly restricted driver access to available loads

solution.acceptLoad: Drivers can now accept loads where status='available' AND assignedDriverId=null, or loads already assigned to them
solution.rejectLoad: Drivers can now reject loads where status='available' AND assignedDriverId=null, or loads already assigned to them
solution.privilege_check: Admins and owners bypass all restrictions; drivers have granular access based on load state

permission_fix.logging: Added console.log statements for debugging acceptance/rejection attempts with userId, role, loadId, status, and assignedDriverId

cost_transparency.labeling: All values labeled 'Estimado' with disclaimer: 'Estimado basado en vehículo, millas y peajes. No representa la liquidación final.'
cost_transparency.no_backend_changes: No database modifications, no changes to wallet/settlement logic

components_updated.changes: V2 calculations with vehicle-based fuel and maintenance costs
Displays fuel, maintenance, tolls, and total cost breakdown
Complete cost breakdown with vehicle type display
Summary with cost breakdown and accept/reject buttons
Fixed tab navigation from URL query parameter (?tab=operations)

build_status.warnings: Large chunk warnings (expected for complex dashboard app)

testing_notes.manual_validation: Ready for live testing on Railway production with test.driver@wvtransports.com account
test_scenarios: 5. Verify: No 403 error, load status updates to 'assigned', driver is assigned
6. Verify: Cost breakdown displays with 'Estimado' label
7. Test rejection flow with reason input
8. Verify: Rejected load returns to 'available' status
expected_outcomes: ✅ assignedDriverId updates to current driver's ID
✅ Cost breakdown displays correctly with vehicle-based calculations

next_steps: 3. Test driver load acceptance flow with test.driver@wvtransports.com
4. Monitor server logs for permission check logging
5. Confirm cost transparency displays correctly for all vehicle types
6. Validate RBAC: drivers cannot see owner routes

files_included: client/src/pages/DriverOps.tsx - Driver operations page with tab navigation
